data.body: GAP_FINDING: Clarify grep regex syntax. The alternation pattern 'WORKTREE_PATH.*ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT|ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT.*WORKTREE_PATH' requires extended regex. Use: grep -Ec 'WORKTREE_PATH.*ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT|ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT.*WORKTREE_PATH' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md Without -E, BRE treats | as literal, count stays 0 even after cb8c-fb92 lands.
